title: PreScale
tech: Python, FastAPI, Uvicorn, Node.js, Vue.js, Docker, Kubernetes, Helm 3, Terraform, GCP, GKE, Cloud SQL, Redis, Prometheus, Grafana
description: ML-powered infrastructure intelligence platform that shifts monitoring from reactive to proactive prediction. Uses machine learning to forecast traffic, detect anomalies, and optimize resource scaling — before your users notice a thing.

title: Predict - Predictive Auto-Scaling
tech: Python, Terraform, AWS EC2, Lambda, CloudWatch, ALB, RDS, ElastiCache, Docker, Saleor, Locust, scikit-learn, pandas, numpy
description: Intelligent auto-scaling system that uses Machine Learning to predict traffic surges on an e-commerce website and proactively scales EC2 instances using AWS Auto Scaling. Learns from historical CloudWatch metrics to predict future load and adjusts infrastructure before demand spikes occur.

title: AI Image Label Detector
tech: Python, AWS Lambda, Amazon S3, Amazon Rekognition, Amazon SNS, CloudWatch, boto3, AWS CLI
description: Serverless image processing pipeline using AWS Lambda triggered by S3 uploads. Uses Amazon Rekognition to detect labels and objects in images, then publishes notifications via SNS. Fully event-driven architecture with CloudWatch logging.
